message.magic.no_access: You do not have access to magic yet.
message.magic.ability.no_mana: You do not have enough mana.
message.magic.ability.requires_below_fre: Absolute Zero requires Below Freezing to be active.
message.magic.ability.requires_absolute_: Planck Heat requires Absolute Zero to be active.
message.magic.ability.planck_heat_locked: Planck Heat is active. Other abilities are locked.
message.magic.ability.no_target: No valid target in sight for %s.
message.magic.ability.target_controlled: That target is already being controlled.
message.magic.domain.too_close: You cannot cast a domain within %s blocks of another domain's exterior.
message.magic.domain.clash.active: A domain clash is already in progress here.
message.magic.domain.clash.used: This domain has already had a clash and cannot clash again.
message.magic.domain.clash.simultaneous: Both domain casts collided at the same moment and failed.
message.magic.domain.teleport_blocked: Teleportation is sealed inside this domain.
message.magic.domain.unstable: Your magic is unstable after deploying a domain.
message.magic.love_domain.abilities_lock: You cannot use magic abilities while Love Domain Expansion is active.
message.magic.ability.wrong_school: You are not attuned to %s magic.
message.magic.already_attuned: You are already attuned to %s magic.
command.magic.cooldown.reset.all.multipl: Reset all magic cooldowns for %s players.
command.magic.remove.single: Removed all magic data and items from %s.
command.magic.remove.multiple: Removed all magic data and items from %s players.
command.magic.remove.override_cleanup.fa: Removed player magic, but failed to clean ability overrides in %s.
command.magic.ability.access.failure: Failed to update ability access config at %s. Check the server log for details.
command.magic.config.reload.failure: Failed to reload magic config from %s. Check the server log for details.
